result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been successfully completed. The cleaned dataset containing the consolidated language variable (lang) and cohort member identifiers (NSID) has been saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The final dataset contains 16,111 rows and 2 columns, with all missing values properly recoded according to the specified standards (-9 for refusal, -8 for don't know, -3 for not asked, etc.). The output follows all requirements including proper variable naming conventions, missing value harmonization, and time-invariant variable consolidation.
